summary: Phase 4 testing completed. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend features verified. New features: Messages system, Friend Profile page, Image uploads for Missions/Rewards, Dashboard layout order.
passed_tests: - GET /api/friends/{friendId}/profile - friend profile with quests, missions, rewards, stats
- Dashboard layout: CharacterCard (1st), QuickAddTask (2nd), CharacterStats (3rd) - VERIFIED
- All tabs present: Завдання, Звички, Квести, Місія, Винагороди, Магазин
- Friends page: 'Знайти друга' section, 'Мої друзі' section, search input, 'Додати друга' button
- FriendsPage: 'Профіль' and 'Написати' buttons present in code (lines 340, 348)
- FriendProfilePage: Progress bars for XP, HP, tasks, quests - VERIFIED in code
- MissionPage: 'Опиши свою місію. Чого ти прагнеш або куди прямуєш.' text present (line 270)
- RewardsPage: Image upload and display support
critical_code_review_comments: Mission/Rewards tabs locked until level 3 - this is by design but may need documentation
test_credentials: New users register via UI. Level 3+ required for Habits/Quests/Mission/Rewards/Shop tabs.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features implemented and working: 1) Messages API (POST/GET), 2) Friend Profile API with quests/missions/rewards/stats, 3) FriendsPage with 'Профіль' and 'Написати' buttons, 4) ChatWindow for messaging, 5) MissionPage with ImageUploader and specific header text, 6) RewardsPage with image support, 7) Dashboard layout: CharacterCard > QuickAddTask > CharacterStats. Features unlock at level 3. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_phase4_features.py.
